_source: data/derived/obtained_perks.json (constellations + jumps); coordinates hand-designed in scripts/build_constellation_wireframes.py
_note: Two-level wireframe model. cluster_constellations[i] is one of the 14 named constellations as a hand-drawn silhouette themed by its name (e.g. Toolkits = wrench). Each cluster's cluster_vertices array places the contained jumps in slots along that silhouette, sorted by descending perk count so the biggest sub-constellations sit on the most prominent anchor points. jump_constellations is a per-jump star pattern themed by the source media (abstract, never a literal logo); stars are perks, size encodes cost on a sqrt ramp (100=>~0.33, 800=>~0.94, null/free=>0.20).
